## Summary

- Explain the problem this change solves.
- Link any relevant issue or discussion.

## Testing

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] Additional testing noted below, if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `README.md` was updated for user-visible behavior or setup changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No secrets or live merchant data were added to the diff
